text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand a newly-delivered fan letter to Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I recognize the name on this one. So they
were nice enough to write me again!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They're always so proper with their salutations
and sign-offs. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. They're quite formal for fan letters, but
they're always so touching.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention carefully crafted. I can see the
improvement in their handwriting with each one.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They've even started being creative,
incorporating seasonal themes and sometimes
writing haikus.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Each letter they write demonstrates how in tune
they are with my interests.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell how much this fan wants to make Grass
Wonder happy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's not just this fan, either—I've received a
number of letters illustrating aspects of Japanese
culture or explaining unique regional traditions...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When I receive letters like these from people
around the country, it makes me feel like... like...
choice_data_list: Like you don't want to let them down?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. It makes losing even less of an
option.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fire quietly blazes in Grass Wonder's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Through thick and thin, I'll remain committed. I'll
be relying on your dedication as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the fan support has boosted Grass
Wonder's spirits.
